zh.lifeSummary: 當Gaitelgrima de Bénévent於0992年1月6日出生時，她的父親Pandolfo II di Benevento17歲，母親Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 1113歲。她和Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1031年1月7日享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gaitelgrima de Bénévent于0992年1月6日出生时，她的父亲Pandolfo II di Benevento17岁，母亲Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 1113岁。她和Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1031年1月7日享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bénévent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Nunzio, Antonio, Concetta, Donato, Enrico, Fiore, Luigi, Marcello, Orazio, Pasquale.
habitational name from the city or province of Benevento in southwestern Italy.

en.lifeSummary: When Gaitelgrima de Bénévent was born on 6 January 0992, her father, Pandolfo II di Benevento, was 17 and her mother, Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111, was 3. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne. She died on 7 January 1031, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gaitelgrima de Bénévent est née le 6 janvier 0992, son père, Pandolfo II di Benevento, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111, avait 3 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1031, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gaitelgrima de Bénévent am 6. Januar 0992 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pandolfo II di Benevento 17 und ihre Mutter Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111 3. Sie hatte mit Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1031 im Alter von 39 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gaitelgrima de Bénévent è nata il il 6 gennaio 0992, sua padre, Pandolfo II di Benevento, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111, aveva 3 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne. Morì il 7 gennaio 1031, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gaitelgrima de Bénéventが0992年1月6日に生まれた時，父Pandolfo II di Beneventoは17歳，母Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111は3歳であった。彼女はGuaimar III le Toscan de Salerneとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1031年1月7日に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gaitelgrima de Bénévent(이)가 0992년 1월 6일에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pandolfo II di Benevento(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111(은)는 3세였다. 그녀는 Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1031년 1월 7일 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.06 JAN 992–@#DJULIAN@ 07 JAN 1031: 0992 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 6–1031 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 7

pt.06 JAN 992–@#DJULIAN@ 07 JAN 1031: 6 de janeiro de 0992–7 de janeiro de 1031
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gaitelgrima de Bénévent nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 0992, seu pai, Pandolfo II di Benevento, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111, tinha 3 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1031, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gaitelgrima de Bénévent родилась 6 января 0992 г., её отцу по имени Pandolfo II di Benevento было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111, 3. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne. Она умерла 7 января 1031 г. в возрасте 39 лет.

es.06 JAN 992–@#DJULIAN@ 07 JAN 1031: 6 de enero de 0992–7 de enero de 1031
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gaitelgrima de Bénévent nació el 6 de enero de 0992, su papá, Pandolfo II di Benevento, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Aldara Ultar Di San Massimo 111, tenía 3 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Guaimar III le Toscan de Salerne. Murió el 7 de enero de 1031, a la edad de 39 años.
